blockers.description: Playwright tests cannot run: missing libnspr4.so (no sudo in WSL)
blockers.workaround: Manual testing: load extension in Chrome, test on YouTube VOD

human_actions_pending.action: Run Phase 1 e2e tests in environment with system deps
human_actions_pending.context: Tests exist at tests/e2e/phase1-youtube.spec.js but need libnspr4.so to launch Chromium

decisions.decision: Game detection: title scan + manual fallback
decisions.rationale: YouTube has no game category; simplest approach that works

decisions.decision: Rename twitchSlug to legacyTwitchSlug in catalog
decisions.rationale: Cleaner model when games span platforms

decisions.decision: Skip Twitch extension interference code on YouTube
decisions.rationale: YouTube doesn't have equivalent extension iframes

decisions.decision: Use PLATFORM constant derived from location.hostname
No channel-based creator config for YouTube v1
decisions.rationale: Deferred; title matching + manual covers our use case

next_action: Plan Phase 2: Read content.js, identify all Twitch-specific code paths, add platform guards, ensure YouTube video/coordinate support
context_notes: Pixel pipeline (capture → dHash → match → popup) already platform-agnostic. Twitch-specific code is limited to detectTwitchGame(), detectTwitchExtensions()/disableTwitchExtensions(), and popup URL checks. All can be platform-guarded with PLATFORM constant. Key risk: clientToVideoCoords() letterbox math uses object-fit: contain which YouTube doesn't use.
